raw_text:
Unofficial Translation by Insurance Regulator of Cambodia (IRC)

**Article 20 ..**

General insurance company and life insurance company intent to establish local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch shall pay for administrative fees as follows:
- service on reviewing documents applying for principle approval to conduct local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch is charged for 500 000 (five hundred thousand) riels
- service on reviewing documents applying for certificate of local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch is charged for 500 000 (five hundred thousand) riels
- service on reviewing documents applying for renewal of certificate of local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch is charged for 500 000 (five hundred thousand) riels.

**Article 21 ..**

General insurance company and life insurance company operating in the Kingdom of Cambodia shall pay for administrative fees as follows:
- service on reviewing documents applying for renewal of general insurance company business license or life insurance company business license in order to obtain a new permanently valid license is charged for 2 000 000 (two million) riels
- service on reviewing documents applying for renewal of certificate of local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch in order to obtain a new validation certificate for 5 (five) years is charged for 500 000 (five hundred thousand) riels.

**Article 22 ..**

The administrative fees for reviewing documents service that comply with this Prakas shall be non-refundable, even though the application has been reject.

**Section 2**
**License and Certificate Fees**

**Article 23 ..**

The license fee of general insurance company business or life insurance company business or foreign insurance company business branch for the first-year is 120 000 000 (one hundred twenty million) riels. Annual license fee is 40 000 000 (forty million) riels for the following year, which the companies have to pay annually before January 7th of the business operation year.

**Article 24 ..**

General insurance company and life insurance company operating in the Kingdom of Cambodia are not required to pay for the first-year license fee, however the company shall pay for annual license fee which is 40 000 000 (forty million) riels before January 7th of the business operation year.

**Article 25 ..**

The fee of local general insurance company branch certificate and local life insurance company branch certifcate that valid for 5 (five) years is 25 000 000 (twenty-five million) riels.
